arts.ttl: PSG Set to Sign Napoli Megastar on Favorable Terms
arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain could reportedly complete a long-awaited deal for wantaway Napoli forward Khvicha Kvaratskhelia on favorable terms. According to L'Equipe, the Georgian's impending arrival won't set the club back €80 million as initially expected.
